subtitle: Private AI Voice Journal
description:
Soulo is a private AI-powered voice journal that helps you understand yourself better. Speak your thoughts, and Soulo analyzes your speech patterns to reveal hidden insights about your emotional well-being, behavioral patterns, and personal growth.

HOW IT WORKS:
• Record voice entries as naturally as speaking to a friend
• Your voice is transcribed on-device — nothing leaves your phone
• AI analyzes speech biomarkers (rate, pitch, energy, hesitations)
• Patterns are detected: broken promises, topic avoidance, goal cycles, sentiment trends
• Personalized insights delivered daily

KEY FEATURES:
✓ 100% On-Device Processing
  All transcription, analysis, and pattern detection happens on your device. Your voice data never leaves your phone.

✓ Voice Biomarker Analysis
  Speech rate, pitch instability, vocal energy, hesitation patterns, micro-breaths, jitter, and shimmer — all computed from your natural speech.

✓ Pattern Detection Engine
  Identifies broken promises, topic avoidance, declining sentiment, goal abandonment, contradictions, cognitive shifts, and relationship patterns.

✓ Voice-Powered Emotion Detection
  Understands your emotional state from voice tone using on-device AI models.

✓ Daily Insights
  Get personalized insights about your patterns, emotions, and growth trends delivered each morning.

✓ Encrypted & Private
  AES-GCM encryption for all audio. End-to-end encrypted iCloud backups. No account required.

✓ Export Your Data
  Export your journal as JSON, CSV, or text anytime.

SUBSCRIPTIONS:
Soulo offers a free tier (7 entries) to try the experience.
• Monthly: $9.99/month
• Annual: $79.99/year (save 33%)

Privacy Policy: https://soulo.app/privacy
Terms of Service: https://soulo.app/terms
promotionalText: The only voice journal that understands what your voice says about how you feel.

6.5inch.description: Recording screen with waveform visualization and real-time transcription
Insights dashboard showing detected patterns, biomarker trends, and topic analysis
Entry history with emotion tags, topics, and sentiment indicators
Voice biomarker breakdown with charts for speech rate, energy, and pitch

12.9inch.description: Full iPad dashboard with entry list and insight panels side by side

appReviewNotes: No account required. Voice processing happens on-device. Subscription requires StoreKit testing in sandbox. Backend Stripe endpoint at api.soulo.app/stripe is optional — core features work without it.

demoAccount.note: App works fully without account. All data is local.
